articles.title: PM in Indonesia LIVE: Modi hails new 'golden chapter in India and Indonesia bilateral relations'
articles.sum: PM Modi conferred with Indonesia's highest honour ’Bintang Adipurna of the Republic of Indonesia’ medal

articles.title: Government pleader appointments are being made transparently, says Minister Nirmalkumar
articles.sum: Mr. Nirmalkumar said so far, appointments have been made only in three districts

articles.title: Telangana Fire Department launches civil defence volunteer training at two universities
articles.sum: The volunteers to received training in rescue operations, firefighting, first aid, crowd management, disaster preparedness, community awareness and relief distribution

articles.title: U.P. govt. committed to ensuring that every needy receives benefits of welfare schemes, says CM Yogi
articles.sum: Mr. Adityanath held Janata Darshan in Lucknow and met every petitioner who had come from different districts of the State and listened to their grievances

articles.title: Anbumani, PMK MLAs meet WRD Minister N. Anand
articles.sum: Dr. Anbumani urged the State government to implement 12 water management projects, and said around ₹1 lakh crore should be invested in water projects over the next 10 years despite the financial burden experienced by the State

articles.title: Rogue elephant sparks safety concerns along Chittoor-Bengaluru highway
articles.sum: Forest Department has intensified field-level mitigation measures; DFO appeals to the public not to approach, provoke, or disturb the elephant and to immediately report its movement to the forest officials.

articles.title: Faith knows no age as 116-year-old completes Tirumala trek
articles.sum: Centenarian devotee’s foot pilgrimage goes viral, prompting TTD to trace her and facilitate a special darshan; Chief Minister praises her devotion

articles.title: Modi begins three-nation trip, starts with Indonesia to boost strategic ties
articles.sum: Prime Minister is set to hold discussions with Indonesian President Subianto to add ‘momentum to this partnership across diverse sectors’; he will travel to Australia and New Zealand next as part of efforts to promote a free and open Indo-Pacific

articles.title: PM Modi conferred with Indonesia's highest honour during his 2-day state visit
articles.sum: The Bintang Republik Indonesia Adipurna, commonly referred to as the Bintang Adipurna, is Indonesia's highest state honour. It is the highest class of the Star of the Republic of Indonesia (Bintang Republik Indonesia), the country's premier order of merit, and is conferred by the...

articles.title: Indonesia to build country-specific EVMs with India's support
articles.sum: The two countries are also expected to deepen cooperation in critical minerals. According to sources, India will invest in the manufacturing of steel, nickel and rare earth permanent magnets in Indonesia to strengthen resilient supply chains for strategic industries. Prime Minist...

articles.title: 'No fault of Champat Rai': Ram Mandir trustee says all 'gold and silver donations safe'
articles.sum: Responding to allegations that precious offerings had gone missing, the trustee categorically rejected the claims and said every gold and silver donation remained secure. "Regarding the serious allegations that saddened many--specifically about the gold and silver donations--all ...

articles.title: ARAI report found E20 fuel may damage rubber parts in E10 vehicles, engine durability tests carried out for 400-806 hrs
articles.sum: An ARAI report noted rubber part deterioration in E10 vehicles using E20 fuel. Metallic components showed no adverse impact, and emissions remained within legislative limits. One BS-VI turbocharged engine experienced issues after durability testing, unlike a BS-IV engine. Two-whe...

articles.title: Nabin's simplicity reflects BJP's values, says Modi
articles.sum: Prime Minister Narendra Modi publicly supported BJP president Nitin Nabin. He highlighted Nabin's simplicity as a source of pride for party members. This defense followed mocking remarks from Telangana CM Revanth Reddy and Arvind Kejriwal. Nabin, a former Bihar MLA, faced critici...
